description.en: Cultivated primarily in the central highlands and the Knuckles Forest Reserve under shade of taller trees. As of 2009, ~2,794 ha under cultivation producing ~61 tons; high-yielding cultivars can reach ~450 kg/ha of green pods.

elevation_m.quote: Knuckles Forest Reserve runs approximately northwest to southeast in the central highlands over a distance of 20 km and across an altitudinal range of 200–1900 m a.s.l.

temperature_c.quote: annual lows of 13 to 20°C, annual highs of 21 to 29°C

expected_yield_kg_per_acre.quote: Average yields of green pods range from 168 to 280 kgs per hectare, or the equivalent of 150 to 250 lbs per acre, while high-yielding cultivars reportedly yield up to 450 kgs per hectare

description.quote: By 2009 the total extent under cardamom cultivation was 2,794 ha in Sri Lanka, and production for that year was 61 t
